Alberto Monge Roffarello
CVDigital WellbeingEUDPublicationsTeaching

I am a postdoctoral research assistant at the Department of Control and Computer Engineering, Politecnico di Torino, with the e-Lite Research Group.
My current research targets the end user personalization of smart devices, online services, and user’s behaviors with these technologies. On the one hand, I focus on end-user personalization of Internet of Things ecosystems. On the other hand, I explore how to support users to achieve what Google called the "digital wellbeing".

Highlights

  • May 22, 2020

    PhD Defense

  • May 9, 2019

    Presentation of "Empowering End Users in Debugging Trigger-Action Rules" at CHI 2019

  • May 6, 2019

    Presentation of "The Race Towards Digital Wellbeing: Issues and Opportunities" at CHI 2019
